STS2_WINE_FOX_RELIC_HAND_CRANK.title: Hand Crank
STS2_WINE_FOX_RELIC_HAND_CRANK.descripti: At the start of each combat, gain [blue]{Stress}[/blue] [gold]Stress[/gold].
STS2_WINE_FOX_RELIC_HAND_CRANK.flavor: A mysterious relic from another world. It is said that once you see it, you will want to keep turning it.
STS2_WINE_FOX_RELIC_MAID_BACKPACK.title: Maid Backpack
STS2_WINE_FOX_RELIC_MAID_BACKPACK.descri: When picked up, gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Potion Slots[/gold] and fill all empty slots with random potions.
STS2_WINE_FOX_RELIC_MAID_BACKPACK.flavor: A tiny backpack with remarkable capacity, stuffed with all kinds of food prepared by its owner.
STS2_WINE_FOX_RELIC_DEPLOYER.title: Hand of God
STS2_WINE_FOX_RELIC_DEPLOYER.description: At the start of each combat, gain [blue]{Stress}[/blue] [gold]Stress[/gold].
STS2_WINE_FOX_RELIC_DEPLOYER.flavor: A mysterious relic from another world. It provides even more Stress than the Hand Crank.
